description: Perform a quantitative ELISA data analysis using the workbook 'elisa_data.xlsx' on the Desktop. Complete the 'Results_Template' sheet by calculating Corrected OD values (subtracting average Blank OD), establishing a log-log transformed standard curve (Log10 Concentration vs Log10 Corrected OD) using the provided standards (300, 100, 50, 25, 12.5, 6.25, 3.125 pg/mL), and determining patient sample concentrations using the resulting linear regression. Calculate the %CV for all sample replicates, flagging those above 15% as 'REPEAT'. Include a scatter plot of the log-transformed standard curve and save the completed workbook to the Desktop.
